notes: Numeric manuscript identifier. URL param overrides dashboard default.
UUID of the evaluation job. Required for section generation prompts.
Displayed in Selected Manuscript panel and embedded in export document header.
Manuscript-specific. Transitions: Not Started → Draft (first section generated) → Approved (all 6 approved) → Exported (download completed).

canonicalValues: query_letter; what_makes_unique; synopsis; query_pitch; comparables; author_bio
notes: Exactly 6 canonical values. No other section types permitted.
generate = fresh; regenerate = discard prior and generate fresh; improve = refine existing content.
Required when section=author_bio. Minimum 50 chars. System shapes only supplied facts — must not invent credentials.
Generated section text. Must pass quality gate before persistence.
Computed from content split on whitespace. Used by quality gate to enforce limits and minimums.
Set to draft on persistence. Transitions to approved only by explicit author action.
Exactly 2 canonical values. No other export formats permitted.
Boolean. Must be true for section to proceed to persistence.
Populated on gate failure. Must not be directly exposed as raw DB/system error in client response.
Authenticated user ID from Supabase session. All write operations require authentication.
true iff all 6 canonical section types have status=approved for this (user_id, manuscript_id).
Creator approval state for Storygate handoff. Storygate accepts only approved.
Boolean compatibility field. Must be true iff approval_state=approved.
